review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::fr-0.summary: Silent proxy: days_since_last_donation used as value for days_since_last_communication in model feature extraction

evidence: Donor dataclass has no days_since_last_communication field, so this proxy is unavoidable and silently degrades model accuracy
FEATURE_COLS includes days_since_last_communication as a distinct column but the Donor model cannot supply it
detail.suggestion: Add days_since_last_communication as a field on the Donor dataclass and populate it from real data, or remove the feature column and document why the proxy is acceptable.

review::.::holistic::advocacy_security_p.summary: CORS wildcard allow_origins=['*'] on donor behavioral data API

evidence: CORSMiddleware configured with allow_origins=['*'] and allow_credentials=True
Comment in server.py says 'Tighten per environment' but no environment-specific override mechanism is present
Fundraising platform handles donor behavioral data that should not be accessible cross-origin by default
detail.suggestion: Set allow_origins to an explicit list of trusted origins (e.g. dashboard hostname) in production. Remove the wildcard before deployment.

review::.::holistic::initialization_coup.summary: Module-level _embedding_model singleton creates hidden state across test runs

evidence: _embedding_model is a module-level global set to None at import time
_get_embedding_model() mutates this global on first call with no cleanup mechanism
Tests mocking sentence_transformers must manually reset this global to avoid state leakage between runs
detail.suggestion: Move the embedding model cache inside GrantMatcher as an instance attribute, or use a module-level cache with an explicit reset function for test isolation.

review::.::holistic::dependency_health::.summary: catboost ImportError fallback log message omits install instructions

evidence: logger.warning message reads only: 'catboost not installed; falling back to rules-based scoring'
No install command or documentation reference is included
pyproject.toml defines a [catboost] optional extra that would fix this, but operators are not told about it
detail.suggestion: Change the warning to include the install command: 'catboost not installed; falling back to rules-based scoring. Install with: pip install open-paws-fundraising[catboost]'
